themes.label: Creation

Word-study detail reinforces "הָאָ֙רֶץ֙: between the earth - the earth (at large, or partitively a land)".

themes.label: Grace/Mercy
themes.summary: This chapter highlights undeserved favor, mercy, forgiveness, compassion, or pardon. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "David's response 'Let me fall now into the hand of the LORD; for very great are his mercies:...". Word-study detail reinforces "רַֽחֲמָיו֙: are his mercies - compassion (in the plural)".
